name: map-side-drawer
description: Persistent right-side info drawer for map feature detail. Slides in on feature click; stays visible while map remains interactive. Replaces popup-on-marker pattern with a complementary panel. Reference implementation: gis.woodfinegroup.com (v0.1.94).
html:
{{brand-code}}

{{feature-name}}

Address
{{address}}
NAICS
{{naics}}
Open
{{year-opened}}
Within cluster {{cluster-id}} {{anchor-count}} anchors · {{max-radius}}m max radius

variants.name: comparison
variants.description: Split drawer with two features side-by-side; for federated cluster comparison (Doctrine invention #9). Decision pending.

aria: role='complementary' + aria-label='<feature-type> details'. h2 inside drawer is the secondary heading. Close button: <button aria-label='Close details'>. Brand badge: aria-label states family name. aria-modal='false' — map stays interactive. Focus trap: Tab cycles within drawer while open; ESC dismisses and returns focus to map canvas.
motion: prefers-reduced-motion: collapse transition to 0ms; keep opacity fade.
open_questions: oq-1: Should drawer expand to full-width on viewports below 640px or remain 340px overlay? Carbon responsive pattern vs GIS map-context preservation.
oq-2: Comparison variant — two drawer columns (640px total) or split-screen with map between? Decision pending cluster-comparison feature work.
